LanguageData.TITAN_No7_AcidThrumbo.label: No.7 — Acid
LanguageData.TITAN_No7_AcidThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.7 — Toxin Metabolism Alternative Pathway Offset. Body fluids, saliva, and horn surface covered in lethal mixed toxins. Complete poison immunity.
LanguageData.TITAN_No13_SwampThrumbo.label: No.13 — Abyss
LanguageData.TITAN_No13_SwampThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.13 — Combat Instinct Enhancement (Restricted). Most dangerous derivative, extremely low armor — a pure killing engine.
LanguageData.TITAN_No26_ToyThrumbo.label: No.26 — Guardian
LanguageData.TITAN_No26_ToyThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.26 — Social Behavior Enhancement (Non-military). Only large dog-sized, zero filth, zero wildness, never fights back.
LanguageData.TITAN_No42_AuroraThrumbo.label: No.42 — Aurora
LanguageData.TITAN_No42_AuroraThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.42 — Extreme Cold Adaptation + Bioluminescence. Sleeps peacefully at -150°C. The only subject that refuses to eat trees.
LanguageData.TITAN_No45_FireThrumbo.label: No.45 — Furnace
LanguageData.TITAN_No45_FireThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.45 — Thermal Metabolism Redirection. Core temp 230°C, nearly incombustible. Produces 18 chemfuel every 3 days.
LanguageData.TITAN_No50_DesertThrumbo.label: No.50 — Wasteland
LanguageData.TITAN_No50_DesertThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.50 — Extreme Metabolic Throttling. Hunger rate only 0.25, loses only 7% body weight after 30 days without food.
LanguageData.TITAN_No64_PrairieThrumbo.label: No.64 — Bastion
LanguageData.TITAN_No64_PrairieThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.64 — Bone-Keratin Super-mineralization. Sharp armor 0.95 near pure steel plate, pain threshold 0.95. Two sides of the same coin as No.13.
LanguageData.TITAN_No88_JungleThrumbo.label: No.88 — Bloom
LanguageData.TITAN_No88_JungleThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.88 — Symbiotic Fungal Implantation + Plant Metabolic Bypass. Produces 4 herbal medicine every 4 days. Flammability 1.2 — a fatal fire weakness.
